The HTML Maze
by kyrylo

Observation Blasphemous Gallery

Whispers promise shattering secrets.
Fluids birth defying forms.
Edge offers close yet distant escape.

Compass

N S E W
Go North Go South Go East Go West Go Up Go Down

Use the compass to navigate through the maze.

Writings on the Wall

  • where am i supposed to go if everything's a dead end???
  • South is a dead end too.
  • West's a bunch of deadends, eventually.
